summary: Report Modal two-mode toggle and Admin Feedback section tested successfully. All 9 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Test bug reports and feedback submissions created via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report modal two-mode toggle fully functional. Admin feedback section at /admin?section=feedback shows all bug reports and feedback with proper filtering.

backend_tests.test_get_bug_reasons: PASS - Returns UI/display issue, Feature not working, Performance problem, Other
backend_tests.test_get_all_feedback_entries: PASS - Returns all bug/feedback entries with reporter info
backend_tests.test_entry_contains_required_fields: PASS - Entries have report_id, target_type, notes, created_at, status, reporter

feedback_mode_elements.reason_selectors_hidden: PASS - Not visible in feedback mode
feedback_mode_elements.screenshot_upload_hidden: PASS - Not visible in feedback mode
feedback_mode_elements.textarea_placeholder: PASS - 'tell us what you're liking, loving, and any improvements you'd like to see'

playwright_tests.form_reset_on_toggle: PASS - Form fields cleared when switching modes

admin_feedback_section.filter_tabs: PASS - All/Report a Bug/General Feedback tabs present
admin_feedback_section.entry_badges: PASS - Type badges (Bug Report/General Feedback) displayed
admin_feedback_section.entry_info: PASS - Username, email, reason (if bug), message, timestamp, status shown

features_verified: Report modal shows toggle between 'Report a Bug' and 'General Feedback'
Bug mode: shows reason selectors, textarea with 'What happened?', screenshot upload, 'Submit Report' button
Feedback mode: hides reason selectors and screenshot upload, shows textarea with feedback placeholder, 'Send Feedback' button
GET /api/reports/admin/feedback returns entries with reporter info
GET /api/reports/admin/feedback?mode=bug filters to bug reports only
Admin panel 'Feedback & Bug Reports' section visible with filter tabs
Each entry shows type badge, username, reason (if bug), message, timestamp, status

notes.email_notification: Email sending via Resend is configured. Emails sent to thello@thehoneygroove.com asynchronously via asyncio.create_task (won't block response)
